description: baseline (1xH100, 1269 steps, sliding window)

EMA decay=0.997 (worse: too few steps for EMA to help)
warmdown 3000->800 (LR schedule fix for 1xH100)
warmdown 800->500

matrix_lr/scalar_lr 0.04->0.06 (worse, LR too high)

lzma preset=9 (replaces zstd-22, slightly better compression)
EMA decay=0.99 (faster decay for short training)

batch 524K->262K (2x steps but noisier gradients worse)
VE128 on layers 9,10 (value embeddings)
SWA scale<1.0 every=50 (10 snapshots, too early start dilutes good weights)
GPTQ-lite clip search 5 percentiles (marginal, likely seed variance)
warmdown 500->620 (worse, 500 was already optimal for ~1066 steps)
Full Hessian GPTQ + AR self-gen (halved quant gap 0.01->0.006)
BigramHash 3072x112 (worse: too wide for step budget)
